JEERRY WONG-SYDNEY- AUSTRALIA
I would like to inform you that I find great pleasure in reading
your book "FORTUNE TELLING FROM THE
PERMUTATION & ITS COMBINATION OF THE
PLANTETS" I am studying Astrology and I ATHULA
MANACHANA YAKE. B.A. (SRI LANKA) POST
GRADUATE DIPLOMA IN EDUCATION.
I am very happy to inform you that received the very valuable

would like to say that this book is a Gem in the field of

most advanced books are "CORE OF NADI ASTROLOGY"
and "TRANSIT OF PLANETS ON THE BIRTH CHART".
SHRI MURALIDHAR HARIHARAN-LUCKNOW

RESIDNET: PRACHYA VIDYA SHODHAN MANDAL,
